name: Behringer TD-3 Synthesizer
subtitle: 1st Place
description: The legendary 303 sound — reborn. The Behringer TD-3 is a faithful recreation of the iconic Roland TB-303 bassline synthesizer. Featuring the classic squelchy filter, slide and accent controls, and the unmistakable acid sound that defined a generation.

name: Audiotool Premium (1 Year)
subtitle: 2nd Place
description: Full year of Audiotool Premium access. Unlimited projects, all premium devices, exclusive sample packs, and priority support.

name: Acid Sample Pack Bundle
subtitle: 3rd Place
description: Curated bundle of premium acid and 303-style sample packs from leading sound designers.
